notes:
v3.4.9 Compatibility Fixes
🐛 PF2E chat layout: PF2E chat headers now keep the message author line below the character name instead of collapsing into one row.
🐛 CoC7E Fight Back dropdown: The Fight Back weapon dropdown now appears near the chat card button instead of jumping to the top of the chat log.

announcement.title: Character Chat Selector v3.4.9
announcement.content:
Character Chat Selector v3.4.9 fixes two system compatibility issues.

  • PF2E chat headers now keep the message author line below the character name.
  • CoC7E Fight Back weapon dropdowns now open near the chat card button instead of the top of the chat log.
